requirement_topic.en: EMC / Radio Disturbance of Lighting Equipment (BOS standard adopting CISPR 15)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明设备 EMC / 无线电骚扰（采用 CISPR 15 的 BOS 标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明設備 EMC / 無線電騷擾（採用 CISPR 15 的 BOS 標準）

summary.en: Where electromagnetic compatibility is within BOBS regulated-product scope for lighting equipment, LED luminaires are assessed against the BOS standard adopting CISPR 15 / IEC equivalent (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), commonly via the corresponding SANS adoption. This covers conducted disturbance on the supply terminals and radiated disturbance. Demonstration is by testing to the adopted BOS/IEC/CISPR limits at a laboratory acceptable to BOBS. Botswana does not operate a standalone EU-style EMC Directive; instead radio-disturbance limits are addressed through the applicable BOS/IEC standard within the BOBS conformity-assessment / import-inspection regime. For wireless luminaires the radio aspect is separately handled by BOCRA (see ledbw-emc-02).
summary.zh: 在博茨瓦纳照明设备受管制产品范围内涉及电磁兼容时，LED 灯具依据采用 CISPR 15 / IEC 等效（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）的 BOS 标准评估，常经对应 SANS 采标。其涵盖电源端传导骚扰及辐射骚扰。通过在 BOBS 可接受的实验室按所采 BOS/IEC/CISPR 限值检测加以证明。博茨瓦纳不设独立的欧盟式 EMC 指令；无线电骚扰限值由 BOBS 合格评定/进口检验制度内适用的 BOS/IEC 标准处理。无线灯具的无线电部分另由 BOCRA 处理（见 ledbw-emc-02）。
summary.zht: 在波札那照明設備受管制產品範圍內涉及電磁兼容時，LED 燈具依據採用 CISPR 15 / IEC 等效（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）的 BOS 標準評估，常經對應 SANS 採標。其涵蓋電源端傳導騷擾及輻射騷擾。透過在 BOBS 可接受的實驗室按所採 BOS/IEC/CISPR 限值檢測加以證明。波札那不設獨立的歐盟式 EMC 指令；無線電騷擾限值由 BOBS 合格評定/進口檢驗制度內適用的 BOS/IEC 標準處理。無線燈具的無線電部分另由 BOCRA 處理（見 ledbw-emc-02）。

standards_or_laws: BOS standard adopting CISPR 15 / IEC equivalent — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment （commonly via SANS adoption）
BOBS conformity assessment / import inspection for regulated lighting equipment

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (covering both safety and EMC for relevant categories), with testing at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are issued for the Chinese route and are not automatically accepted under the Botswana BOBS pathway.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，作为 CCC 认证（对相关类别涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分，并在 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室检测。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告是为中国路径出具的，不被博茨瓦纳 BOBS 路径自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，作為 CCC 認證（對相關類別涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分，並在 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室檢測。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告是為中國路徑出具的，不被波札那 BOBS 路徑自動接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment （aligned with CISPR 15）

gap.en: Both the BOS standard and China's GB 17743 derive from CISPR 15, so radio-disturbance limits are largely harmonised and a product compliant with GB 17743 is technically close to the Botswana basis. The gap is procedural rather than technical: (1) Botswana has no separate EU-style EMC Directive — confirm with BOBS whether EMC/radio-disturbance is part of the regulated-product conformity assessment for the specific luminaire category, or handled only at import inspection; (2) test reports should come from an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory acceptable to BOBS, and Chinese CCC EMC reports are not automatically transferable; (3) confirm the exact BOS reference and whether it is a direct IEC/CISPR adoption or routed through SANS. Unlike the EU, there is no EMC immunity harmonised-standard expectation layered on top — confirm whether immunity testing is required by BOBS for the category.
gap.zh: BOS 标准与中国 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，无线电骚扰限值基本协调，符合 GB 17743 的产品在技术上接近博茨瓦纳基础。差距偏程序性而非技术性：（1）博茨瓦纳无独立的欧盟式 EMC 指令——请向 BOBS 确认 EMC/无线电骚扰是否属该灯具类别受管制产品合格评定的一部分，抑或仅在进口检验环节处理；（2）检测报告应来自 BOBS 可接受的 ILAC MRA 认可实验室，中国 CCC EMC 报告不可自动转用；（3）确认具体 BOS 引用是直接 IEC/CISPR 采标还是经 SANS 采标。与欧盟不同，没有在其上叠加 EMC 抗扰度协调标准的预期——请确认 BOBS 是否对该类别要求抗扰度检测。
gap.zht: BOS 標準與中國 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，無線電騷擾限值基本協調，符合 GB 17743 的產品在技術上接近波札那基礎。差距偏程序性而非技術性：（1）波札那無獨立的歐盟式 EMC 指令——請向 BOBS 確認 EMC/無線電騷擾是否屬該燈具類別受管制產品合格評定的一部分，抑或僅在進口檢驗環節處理；（2）檢測報告應來自 BOBS 可接受的 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室，中國 CCC EMC 報告不可自動轉用；（3）確認具體 BOS 引用是直接 IEC/CISPR 採標還是經 SANS 採標。與歐盟不同，沒有在其上疊加 EMC 抗擾度協調標準的預期——請確認 BOBS 是否對該類別要求抗擾度檢測。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — applies where EMC/radio-disturbance is within BOBS regulated-product scope for the luminaire category; assessed against the BOS/CISPR 15-based standard. Confirm scope with BOBS
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Radio-disturbance limits for LED lighting in Botswana are addressed through a BOS standard adopting CISPR 15 (often via SANS), within BOBS conformity assessment / import inspection — Botswana has no separate EU-style EMC Directive. Limits are broadly harmonised with China's GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), but Chinese CCC EMC reports are not automatically accepted; use an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory acceptable to BOBS and confirm whether EMC is in scope for the specific category. Wireless luminaires require separate BOCRA radio approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 博茨瓦纳 LED 照明的无线电骚扰限值通过采用 CISPR 15（常经 SANS）的 BOS 标准处理，纳入 BOBS 合格评定/进口检验——博茨瓦纳无独立的欧盟式 EMC 指令。限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，但中国 CCC EMC 报告不被自动接受；请使用 BOBS 可接受的 ILAC MRA 认可实验室，并确认 EMC 是否属该类别范围。无线灯具须另取得 BOCRA 无线电核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 波札那 LED 照明的無線電騷擾限值透過採用 CISPR 15（常經 SANS）的 BOS 標準處理，納入 BOBS 合格評定/進口檢驗——波札那無獨立的歐盟式 EMC 指令。限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，但中國 CCC EMC 報告不被自動接受；請使用 BOBS 可接受的 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室，並確認 EMC 是否屬該類別範圍。無線燈具須另取得 BOCRA 無線電核准。

requirement_topic.en: Radio-Type Approval for Wireless / Smart Luminaires (BOCRA)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线/智能灯具的无线电型号核准（BOCRA）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線/智能燈具的無線電型號核准（BOCRA）

summary.en: Smart or wireless-enabled LED luminaires (e.g., Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee dimming/control) that incorporate a radio transmitter are subject to type approval by the Botswana Communications Regulatory Authority (BOCRA) before being supplied or imported into Botswana. BOCRA type approval covers the radio module's use of the spectrum and conformity to applicable radio-equipment requirements; it is administered separately from BOBS product-safety conformity. Manufacturers/importers typically submit the radio module's test evidence (commonly IEC/ETSI/FCC-style radio test reports) and obtain a BOCRA type-approval certificate, with an in-country importer often required to lodge the application.
summary.zh: 含无线电发射器的智能或具备无线功能的 LED 灯具（如 Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee 调光/控制），在向博茨瓦纳供应或进口前，须经博茨瓦纳通信监管局（BOCRA）型号核准。BOCRA 型号核准涵盖无线模块的频谱使用及对适用无线电设备要求的符合性；其与 BOBS 产品安全合格评定分开管理。制造商/进口商通常提交无线模块的检测证据（常为 IEC/ETSI/FCC 式无线电检测报告）并取得 BOCRA 型号核准证书，且通常需在地进口商提交申请。
summary.zht: 含無線電發射器的智能或具備無線功能的 LED 燈具（如 Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee 調光/控制），在向波札那供應或進口前，須經波札那通信監管局（BOCRA）型號核准。BOCRA 型號核准涵蓋無線模組的頻譜使用及對適用無線電設備要求的符合性；其與 BOBS 產品安全合格評定分開管理。製造商/進口商通常提交無線模組的檢測證據（常為 IEC/ETSI/FCC 式無線電檢測報告）並取得 BOCRA 型號核准證書，且通常需在地進口商提交申請。

standards_or_laws: Botswana Communications Regulatory Authority (BOCRA) — radio/telecom type approval for radio-transmitting equipment
BOBS product-safety conformity remains separately applicable to the luminaire （see ledbw-safety-01）

summary.en: In China, wireless-enabled luminaires require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission / State Radio Monitoring Center) type approval for the radio transmitter, in addition to CCC product certification for the luminaire. SRRC approval governs the use of radio frequencies within China. SRRC certificates are issued for the Chinese spectrum regime and are not accepted by BOCRA — Botswana radio approval must be obtained separately.
summary.zh: 在中国，具备无线功能的灯具除灯具的 CCC 产品认证外，其无线电发射器还须取得 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会/国家无线电监测中心）型号核准。SRRC 核准管辖在中国境内的无线电频率使用。SRRC 证书是为中国频谱制度出具的，不被 BOCRA 接受——博茨瓦纳无线电核准须另行取得。
summary.zht: 在中國，具備無線功能的燈具除燈具的 CCC 產品認證外，其無線電發射器還須取得 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會/國家無線電監測中心）型號核准。SRRC 核准管轄在中國境內的無線電頻率使用。SRRC 證書是為中國頻譜制度出具的，不被 BOCRA 接受——波札那無線電核准須另行取得。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for radio-transmitting equipment （including wireless luminaires） in China

gap.en: Both Botswana (BOCRA) and China (SRRC) require national radio-type approval for wireless luminaires, so the obligation type is parallel — but the certificates are country-specific and non-transferable. A Chinese SRRC certificate does not satisfy BOCRA. For Botswana, manufacturers/importers must: (1) obtain BOCRA type approval for the embedded radio module before supply/import; (2) supply radio test evidence acceptable to BOCRA (IEC/ETSI/FCC-style reports are commonly recognised, but confirm BOCRA's current accepted formats); (3) typically appoint an in-country importer/representative to lodge the application. This is in addition to, not instead of, the BOBS product-safety conformity for the luminaire itself. Where a luminaire has no radio transmitter, BOCRA approval is not required.
gap.zh: 博茨瓦纳（BOCRA）与中国（SRRC）均要求无线灯具取得国家无线电型号核准，义务类型并行——但证书属各国专有且不可转用。中国 SRRC 证书不满足 BOCRA。对博茨瓦纳，制造商/进口商须：（1）在供应/进口前为内置无线模块取得 BOCRA 型号核准；（2）提供 BOCRA 可接受的无线电检测证据（IEC/ETSI/FCC 式报告通常获认可，但请确认 BOCRA 现行接受的格式）；（3）通常须委任在地进口商/代表提交申请。此为对灯具本身 BOBS 产品安全合格评定的补充，而非替代。若灯具无无线电发射器，则无需 BOCRA 核准。
gap.zht: 波札那（BOCRA）與中國（SRRC）均要求無線燈具取得國家無線電型號核准，義務類型並行——但證書屬各國專有且不可轉用。中國 SRRC 證書不滿足 BOCRA。對波札那，製造商/進口商須：（1）在供應/進口前為內置無線模組取得 BOCRA 型號核准；（2）提供 BOCRA 可接受的無線電檢測證據（IEC/ETSI/FCC 式報告通常獲認可，但請確認 BOCRA 現行接受的格式）；（3）通常須委任在地進口商/代表提交申請。此為對燈具本身 BOBS 產品安全合格評定的補充，而非替代。若燈具無無線電發射器，則無需 BOCRA 核准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for wireless luminaires — BOCRA radio-type approval required before supply/import of radio-transmitting luminaires; not required for non-radio luminaires
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for wireless luminaires — SRRC type approval required for the radio transmitter, in addition to CCC for the luminaire

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Wireless/smart LED luminaires with a radio transmitter require BOCRA type approval before supply or import into Botswana, separate from BOBS product-safety conformity. This parallels China's SRRC requirement, but SRRC certificates are not accepted by BOCRA — Botswana approval must be obtained separately, typically via an in-country importer, with radio test evidence acceptable to BOCRA. Non-radio luminaires do not require BOCRA approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 含无线电发射器的无线/智能 LED 灯具在向博茨瓦纳供应或进口前须取得 BOCRA 型号核准，与 BOBS 产品安全合格评定分开。此与中国 SRRC 要求并行，但 SRRC 证书不被 BOCRA 接受——博茨瓦纳核准须另行取得，通常经在地进口商办理，并提供 BOCRA 可接受的无线电检测证据。非无线灯具无需 BOCRA 核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 含無線電發射器的無線/智能 LED 燈具在向波札那供應或進口前須取得 BOCRA 型號核准，與 BOBS 產品安全合格評定分開。此與中國 SRRC 要求並行，但 SRRC 證書不被 BOCRA 接受——波札那核准須另行取得，通常經在地進口商辦理，並提供 BOCRA 可接受的無線電檢測證據。非無線燈具無需 BOCRA 核准。
